template:
defmodule Solution do
  def diff(old, new) when is_binary(old) and is_binary(new) do
    old_bytes = [[SLOT to_list_old]]
    new_bytes = :binary.bin_to_list(new)
    
    # Build LCS table
    table = lcs_table(old_bytes, new_bytes)
    
    # Backtrack to build operations
    ops = backtrack(table, old_bytes, new_bytes, length(old_bytes), length(new_bytes), [])
    
    # Merge consecutive operations of same type
    merge_operations(ops)
  end
  
  defp lcs_table(old, new) do
    m = length(old)
    n = length(new)
    
    # Initialize DP table
    init = for i <- 0..m, into: %{}, do: {{i, 0}, 0}
    init = for j <- 0..n, reduce: init, do: (acc -> Map.put(acc, {0, j}, 0))
    
    # Fill table
    for i <- 1..m, j <- 1..n, reduce: init do
      acc ->
        if [[SLOT lcs_eq]] do
          Map.put(acc, {i, j}, Map.get(acc, {i - 1, j - 1}) + 1)
        else
          Map.put(acc, {i, j}, max(Map.get(acc, {i - 1, j}), Map.get(acc, {i, j - 1})))
        end
    end
  end
  
  defp backtrack(table, old, new, i, j, acc) when i > 0 and j > 0 do
    if Enum.at(old, i - 1) == Enum.at(new, j - 1) do
      backtrack(table, old, new, i - 1, j - 1, [{:keep, 1} | acc])
    else
      if [[SLOT backtrack_branch]] do
        backtrack(table, old, new, i - 1, j, [{:delete, 1} | acc])
      else
        backtrack(table, old, new, i, j - 1, [{:insert, <<Enum.at(new, j - 1)>>} | acc])
      end
    end
  end
  
  defp backtrack(_table, _old, new, 0, j, acc) when j > 0 do
    remaining = new |> Enum.take(j) |> [[SLOT from_list]]
    [{:insert, remaining} | acc]
  end
  
  defp backtrack(_table, _old, _new, i, 0, acc) when i > 0 do
    [{:delete, i} | acc]
  end
  
  defp backtrack(_table, _old, _new, 0, 0, acc), do: acc
  
  defp merge_operations([]), do: []
  
  defp merge_operations(ops) do
    ops
    |> Enum.chunk_by(fn
      {:keep, _} -> :keep
      {:delete, _} -> :delete
      {:insert, _} -> :insert
    end)
    |> Enum.map(fn chunk ->
      case chunk do
        [{:keep, _} | _] -> {:keep, Enum.sum(for {:keep, n} <- chunk, do: n)}
        [{:delete, _} | _] -> {:delete, Enum.sum(for {:delete, n} <- chunk, do: n)}
        [{:insert, _} | _] -> {:insert, Enum.reduce(chunk, <<>>, fn {:insert, b}, acc -> acc <> b end)}
      end
    end)
  end
end
prompt: Wire up the LCS table comparison, the backtrack tie-break, and the bin↔list conversions.
